name: shroud-email
title: Shroud.email
description: View Domains and Create or View Aliases in Shroud.email instance
author: xmok

commands.name: token
commands.title: Create API Token
commands.subtitle: Shroud.email
commands.description: Post to this endpoint with your Shroud.email username and password to get an API token.

commands.name: domains
commands.title: Domains
commands.subtitle: Shroud.email
commands.description: View all domains with valid DNS records.

commands.name: aliases
commands.title: Aliases
commands.subtitle: Shroud.email
commands.description: Create and View all your email aliases.

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
